# cmccloudv2_opensearch (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cmccloudv2_opensearch_flavor" "os_small" { 
    name = "os.small.1"
} 
data "cmccloudv2_opensearch_dashboard_flavor" "dash_small" { 
    name = "dash.small"
}  
# create opensearch 
resource "cmccloudv2_opensearch" "opensearch1" { 
    billing_mode                  = "monthly"
    name                          = "os-55ys"   
    version                       = "2.19.5"
    flavor_id                     = "${data.cmccloudv2_opensearch_flavor.os_small.id}"
    dashboard_flavor_id           = "${data.cmccloudv2_opensearch_dashboard_flavor.dash_small.id}"
    volume_size                   = 20   
    admin_password                = "SV<9wsb7rhhbapb" 
    node_count                    = 2
    enable_isolate_master         = true
    master_count                  = 3
    dashboard_replicas            = 1
    enable_snapshot               = true
    snapshot_creation_cron        = "0 2 * * *"
    snapshot_timezone             = "Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh"
    rentation_max_age             = 14
    rentation_min_count           = 3
    rentation_max_count           = 10
    lb_subnet_id                  = "7f0dca91-6e37-4d41-820a-e32faec487d3"
    enable_storage_autoscaling    = true
    storage_autoscaling_threshold = 80
    storage_autoscaling_increment = 10
    storage_autoscaling_max       = 5000
    tags {
        key = "env"
        value = "prod"
    }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `admin_password` (String, Sensitive) The admin password for OpenSearch access
- `billing_mode` (String) The billing mode of the OpenSearch instance
- `dashboard_flavor_id` (String) The ID of the dashboard node flavor
- `dashboard_replicas` (Number) Number of dashboard replicas
- `enable_isolate_master` (Boolean) Configuring master nodes to only manage the cluster, without handling data or user requests
- `flavor_id` (String) The ID of the OpenSearch node flavor
- `lb_subnet_id` (String) Subnet ID for the Load Balancer
- `name` (String) The name of the OpenSearch cluster
- `node_count` (Number) Number of data nodes in the OpenSearch cluster
- `version` (String) The version of OpenSearch
- `volume_size` (Number) The volume size (in GiB) for the OpenSearch cluster

### Optional

- `api_domain` (String) API domain name. Changes to this field do NOT trigger resource update. If not set, it will be api-<name>.internal
- `dashboard_domain` (String) Dashboard domain name. Changes to this field do NOT trigger resource update. If not set, it will be dashboard-<name>.internal
- `enable_snapshot` (Boolean) Whether to enable automatic snapshots
- `enable_storage_autoscaling` (Boolean) Enable storage autoscaling
- `master_count` (Number) Number of master nodes in the OpenSearch cluster. Required if enable_isolate_master is true
- `rentation_max_age` (Number) Maximum retention age for snapshots (days)
- `rentation_max_count` (Number) Maximum number of snapshots to retain
- `rentation_min_count` (Number) Minimum number of snapshots to retain
- `snapshot_creation_cron` (String) Cron expression for snapshot creation schedule
- `snapshot_timezone` (String) Timezone for snapshot scheduling
- `storage_autoscaling_increment` (Number) Increment size (GiB) for each autoscale event
- `storage_autoscaling_max` (Number) Maximum total storage (GiB) after autoscaling
- `storage_autoscaling_threshold` (Number) Threshold (percent) to trigger storage autoscaling
- `tags` (Block Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--tags))
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) Created time
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) OpenSearch status

<a id="nestedblock--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `key` (String) The key of the tag
- `value` (String) The value of the tag


<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `update` (String)
